description: Impact Fee Calculation — calculates development impact fees for transportation, parks, schools, fire, and utility infrastructure based on project scope and land use

hard_stops.label: Fee Schedule Not Current
hard_stops.logic: Impact fee calculation is based on an outdated fee schedule — must recalculate using the current adopted fee schedule

hard_stops.label: Land Use Category Not in Fee Schedule
hard_stops.logic: Proposed land use category is not defined in the impact fee schedule — requires staff determination before calculating fees

soft_flags.label: Fee Credit May Apply
soft_flags.logic: Property has prior development that was demolished — applicant may be eligible for impact fee credit for the prior use

soft_flags.label: Affordable Housing Exemption
soft_flags.logic: Project includes affordable housing units that may qualify for impact fee reduction or exemption per local ordinance
